DELAYED REPORT...SMALL EF0 TORNADO NEAR EXTENSION RD AND MAIN IN PALM COVE APARTMENT COMPLEX. LAUNCHED EMPTY HOT TUB AND MOVED IT 1300 FEET. SHINGLE DAMAGE WITH SEVERAL LARGE TREES KNOCKED DOWN. SEVERAL EYEWITNESSES SAW THE TORNADO AND THE FLYING HOT TUB.

DELAYED REPORT...NUMEROUS REPORTS OF DOWNED TREES IN AND AROUND ECHO RIDGE AT TROON NORTH NEIGHBORHOOD. TREES RANGED IN HEIGHT FROM 18 TO 35 FT...AND IN WIDTH FROM 4 INCHES TO 2 FEET. TWO CHIMNEYS WERE BLOWN OFF THEIR HOUSES AND A NUMBER OF HOUSES ALSO LOST ROOF TILES.

DELAYED REPORT. DAMAGE AT THE ROCKS CLUB CONDOMINIUM DEVELOPMENT 27440 N. ALMA SCHOOL PKWY... SCOTTSDALE. TSTM WIND DAMAGE WITH LOTS OF NICKLE SIZED HAILSTONES. MANY FIRST PANE OF DOUBLE PAIN WINDOWS BROKEN IN HOMES. 13 LARGE PALO VERDE AND IRONWOOD TREES DOWNED. MANY TILE SHINGLES BLOWN OFF ROOFS. ONE PATIO TABLE BLOWN A DISTANCE OF 100 YDS.
